functional_audit.check: saveProfileForm persists first_name and onboarding_data sobriety/recovery keys for current user
Save reloads bound form state after refresh
Email change reauthenticates with current password then calls supabase.auth.updateUser

ui_evidence.notes: Text_heading_2_ style; IR copy Personal Information
Text_small_ subtitle; mentions timezone/coaching fields not rendered on tab
Form group covers name/email rows only; recovery and save are card siblings per pragmatic flattening
profile-name-group wrapper has no data-bubble-id; only label/input children are marked
Input_default_ style_ref; placeholders Your first name / you@example.com
Marker placed on email Label; IR entity is Group profile-email-group wrapper
profile-email-label text node unmarked; routes constant maps VP to label element
Mounted as card child; Bubble parent is ai_RNbBHYVL
Marker on recovery title paragraph; IR entity is Group profile-recovery-header (icon child ai_RNbBHYWC omitted)
Marker on sobriety label; IR entity is Text profile-recovery-title under ai_RNbBHYWB
Conditional current-password input when email differs from auth email
Button_primary_ style_ref; copy Save Profile matches Bubble

gaps: profile-name-group (ai_RNbBHYVM) and profile-email-group (ai_RNbBHYVP) wrappers lack dedicated data-bubble-id nodes
profile-email-label (ai_RNbBHYVQ) and profile-sobriety-label (ai_RNbBHYWG) unmarked; routes.ts maps WD/VP to wrong entities
Recovery section and save button are card-level siblings of form group; Bubble nests both under ai_RNbBHYVL
Subtitle copy references timezone and coaching mode fields not rendered on this tab

critiques.finding: Bubble ID constants in routes.ts misassign ai_RNbBHYVP (email group) and ai_RNbBHYWD (recovery callout text) to label elements, breaking IR parent-child fidelity checks.
critiques.alternative: Move markers to match inventory.json hierarchy: VP on email-group div, VQ on email label, WD on recovery callout text, WG on sobriety label.

critiques.finding: Recovery mode active Switch is prototype-only; Bubble ai_RNbBHYWF subtree contains only sobriety label and date picker.
critiques.alternative: Drop the Switch or gate it behind a follow-on item if Bubble adds a recovery-mode toggle on the profile tab.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-fix failures (missing UpdateCredentials, header markers) although implementation now satisfies those checks.
critiques.alternative: Refresh preflight.gaps on the next coverage pass to reflect resolved items only.
